---
title: "Rapid SCAN (Tentative Name)"
toc: false
---

This repository (tentatively called Rapid SCAN, where SCAN stands for Surveillance Comparison and iNformation) hosts a collection of notebooks and reports for epidemiological analysis.

## Indicator Evaluation
- [HHS vs. Doctor Visits (State)](indicator_analysis/eval_hhs_vs_doctor_visits_api_state.html)
- [Confirmed Incidence vs. Doctor Visits (County)](indicator_analysis/eval_confirmed_incidence_num_vs_doctor_visits_api_county.html)

## Revision Analysis
- [State: Hospital Admissions (Smoothed COVID-19 from Claims)](revision_analysis/revision_hospital_admissions_smoothed_covid19_from_claims_api_state.html)
